name: How much does hiring a GEO agency cost for law firms?

mainEntity.name: How much does hiring a GEO agency cost for law firms?

acceptedAnswer.description: **GEO services for lawyers range $2K-$15K/month, with 6X-7X ROI for Am Law 200 firms.**[2][9] DIY is free but slower; agencies handle AI-specific tactics.[9] **Key factors:** 1. Top agencies specialize in legal GEO.[9] 2. Value ties to lead quality. 3. Budget for ongoing as AI evolves. **Compare 3 agencies via case studies, start small in LA if local, measure leads vs. cost.** Worth it for visibility edge.[9]
